uuid.description: universal identifier for the video, that can be used across instances

createdAt.description: time at which the video object was first drafted

publishedAt.description: time at which the video was marked as ready for playback (with restrictions depending on `privacy`). Usually set after a `state` evolution.

updatedAt.description: last time the video's metadata was modified

originallyPublishedAt.description: used to represent a date of first publication, prior to the practical publication date of `publishedAt`

category.description: category in which the video is classified

licence.description: licence under which the video is distributed

language.description: main language used in the video

privacy.description: privacy policy used to distribute the video

truncatedDescription.example:
**[Want to help to translate this video?](https://weblate.framasoft.org/projects/what-is-peertube-video/)**


**Take back the control of your videos! [#JoinPeertube](https://joinpeertube.org)**
*A decentralized video hosting network, based on fr...
truncatedDescription.description: truncated description of the video, written in Markdown.

duration.description: duration of the video in seconds

aspectRatio.description: **PeerTube >= 6.1** Aspect ratio of the video stream

thumbnailPath.description: Deprecated in PeerTube v8.1, use thumbnails instead

previewPath.description: Deprecated in PeerTube v8.1, use thumbnails instead

thumbnails.description: **PeerTube >= 8.1** Array of thumbnails for the video

comments.description: **PeerTube >= 7.2** Number of comments on the video

nsfwSummary.description: **PeerTube >= 7.2** More information about the sensitive content of the video

state.description: represents the internal state of the video processing within the PeerTube instance
